mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.fruit_id, c.spec_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, f.name AS fruit_name, f.main_image AS fruit_image, fs.name AS spec_name, COALESCE(fs.price, f.price) AS price, COALESCE(fs.stock, f.stock) AS stock, f.status AS fruit_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN fruit f ON c.fruit_id = f.id LEFT JOIN fruit_spec fs ON c.spec_id = fs.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.fruit_id, c.spec_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, f.name AS fruit_name, f.main_image AS fruit_image, fs.name AS spec_name, COALESCE(fs.price, f.price) AS price, COALESCE(fs.stock, f.stock) AS stock, f.status AS fruit_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN fruit f ON c.fruit_id = f.id LEFT JOIN fruit_spec fs ON c.spec_id = fs.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.fruit_id, c.spec_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, f.name AS fruit_name, f.main_image AS fruit_image, fs.name AS spec_name, COALESCE(fs.price, f.price) AS price, COALESCE(fs.stock, f.stock) AS stock, f.status AS fruit_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN fruit f ON c.fruit_id = f.id LEFT JOIN fruit_spec fs ON c.spec_id = fs.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.fruit_id, c.spec_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, f.name AS fruit_name, f.main_image AS fruit_image, fs.name AS spec_name, COALESCE(fs.price, f.price) AS price, COALESCE(fs.stock, f.stock) AS stock, f.status AS fruit_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN fruit f ON c.fruit_id = f.id LEFT JOIN fruit_spec fs ON c.spec_id = fs.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, fruit_id, spec_id, quantity, selected, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fruitId}, #{specId}, #{quantity}, #{selected}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart SET selected = #{selected}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart SET selected = #{selected}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cart WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId}
